title: CustomDeaths
description: CustomDeaths is a Minecraft plugin that enhances player deaths with custom messages, particles, and sounds
body:
![Index](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27cb203d47cd67074871d27275936d4b944d6e01.png)![Index](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6c5257d64084e10858ab11db9f4cee1a6147f90.png)CustomDeaths is a Minecraft plugin that enhances player deaths with custom messages, particles, and sounds. Features include:

Custom death messages with & color codes and hex support.

Kill-farm protection: repeated kills in a short time are detected and ignored for stats.

Automatic respawn after death.

Unique kill sounds via a decorated GUI (/killsound), with left-click to set and right-click to preview.

Config reload with /killsound reload without restarting the server.

Easy to configure and fully customizable to make your server deaths more immersive and fun.
